text: I would like to carry that on to find out what specific functions of the mind were most effectual and the the three or four most effective changes brought about to create the polarization. This is an interesting query. The primary availing was of such significance that it may be seen to be analogous to the mantling of the earth over all the jewels within the earth's crust. Whereas previously all facets of the Creator were consciously known after the veiling, almost no facets of the creator were known to the mind. Almost all was buried beneath the veil. If one were to attempt to list those functions of mind most significant in that they might be of aid in polarization, one would need to begin with the faculty of visioning, envisioning, or far seeing. Without the veil, the mind was not caught in your illusory time with the veil. Space time is the only obvious possibility for experience, also upon the list of significant veiled functions of the mind would be that of a dreaming. The so-called dreaming contains a great deal, which, if made available to the conscious mind and used shall aid it in a polarization to a great extent, the third a function of the mind, a which is significant and a which has been veiled is that of the knowing of the body, the knowledge of and control over the body having been lost to a great extent in the availing process is vastly lost from the experience of the seeker. Perhaps the most important and significant function that occurred due to the availing of the mind from itself is not in itself a function of mind, but rather is a product of the potential created by this availing. This is the faculty of will or pure desire. We may ask for a brief queries at this time, although there is energy remaining for this working. We are reluctant to continue this contact experiencing continual variations due to pain flares as you call this distortion, although we are unaware of any amiss given material. We are aware that there have been a several points during which our channel was less than optimal. This instrument is most faithful, but a we a do not a wish, a to a misuse of this instrument. Please a query as you will.

segment.segment: I would like to carry that on to find out what specific functions of the mind were most effectual and the the three or four most effective changes brought about to create the polarization.
The primary availing was of such significance that it may be seen to be analogous to the mantling of the earth over all the jewels within the earth's crust.
Whereas previously all facets of the Creator were consciously known after the veiling, almost no facets of the creator were known to the mind.
Almost all was buried beneath the veil.

If one were to attempt to list those functions of mind most significant in that they might be of aid in polarization, one would need to begin with the faculty of visioning, envisioning, or far seeing.
Without the veil, the mind was not caught in your illusory time with the veil.
Space time is the only obvious possibility for experience, also upon the list of significant veiled functions of the mind would be that of a dreaming.

The so-called dreaming contains a great deal, which, if made available to the conscious mind and used shall aid it in a polarization to a great extent, the third a function of the mind, a which is significant and a which has been veiled is that of the knowing of the body, the knowledge of and control over the body having been lost to a great extent in the availing process is vastly lost from the experience of the seeker.

Perhaps the most important and significant function that occurred due to the availing of the mind from itself is not in itself a function of mind, but rather is a product of the potential created by this availing.
This is the faculty of will or pure desire.
We may ask for a brief queries at this time, although there is energy remaining for this working.
We are reluctant to continue this contact experiencing continual variations due to pain flares as you call this distortion, although we are unaware of any amiss given material.
We are aware that there have been a several points during which our channel was less than optimal.
This instrument is most faithful, but a we a do not a wish, a to a misuse of this instrument.
Please a query as you will.
